polly_note: DATA-ONLY REFRESH (Friday 2026-07-17). No pause/promote verdicts today — decision review: Mondays. EN A/B this week: by page A 1.04% (15 txn / 1443 sess) vs B 0.87% (12 txn / 1376 sess); by ad-content lp_a 0.99% (18 txn) vs lp_b 0.85% (15 txn). A nudging slightly ahead this week but well inside noise. Shopify 90d stable: US/UK/IT top 3 markets unchanged (IT now 145 orders / €10,436 in 90d). Next verdict + significance recompute: Monday 2026-07-20.
